basicInfo.name: PCTable.PcName_Skuld
basicInfo.flavor: Skuld is already aware that the divide between the Celestial Realm and the Surface World will eventually dissipate, plunging the whole world into chaos. However, such complications lie outside the scope of her interest.

Normal Attack.desc:
2 Enemies
 - Deals damage equal to 55% of Magic Attack 1 time(s).
 - 100% chance to inflict Magic Vulnerability. [Duration: 2 Turn(s)]
Skill Enhancement Effect
 - Increases Damage: To 70% of Magic Attack.

Skill 1.name: Celestial Journey
Skill 1.desc:
All Enemies
 - Deals damage equal to 32% of Magic Attack 2 time(s).
 - 60% chance to inflict Silence. [Duration: 2 Turn(s)]
 - [100% chance to inflict Incoming Healing Reduction against targets inflicted with [Magic Vulnerability]. [Duration: 3 Turn(s)]
 - Allies (Magic)
 - Grants 2 Debuff Removal(s).
Skill Enhancement Effect
 - Increases Damage: To 37% of Magic Attack.

Skill 2.name: Constellation's Secret
Skill 2.desc:
All Enemies
 - Deals Piercing damage equal to 26% of Magic Attack 3 time(s).
 - 100% chance to inflict Buff Duration Reduction. [Reduced by: 2 Turn(s)]
 - 60% chance to increase skill cooldowns by 23s against targets inflicted with [Magic Vulnerability].
Skill Enhancement Effect
 - Increases Chance: Skill Cooldown Increase chance becomes 70%.

Passive.name: Crescent Moon Seer
Passive.desc:
Self
 - Grants All Damage Nullification. [Ends After: Taking 4 Hit(s)]
 - Heals HP equal to 165% of the caster's Magic Attack when HP falls to 50% or lower. [2 Time(s) per Battle]
 - All Enemies
 - Inflicts Effect Resist Reduction. [Always Active]
Skill Enhancement Effect
 - Increases Effect: Effect Resist Reduction to 34%.

Awaken Skill.name: Radiant Fate
Awaken Skill.desc:
3 Enemies
 - Grants 39% HP Alteration when target is inflicted with [Magic Vulnerability].
 - 100% chance to inflict Unable to Recover. [Duration: 3 Turn(s)]
 - Deals Piercing damage equal to 145% of Magic Attack 1 time(s).
 - 100% chance to inflict Skill Cooldown Increase. [Increased by: 26s]
Skill Enhancement Effect
 - Increases Damage: To 155% of Magic Attack.

profile.likes: Sweet foods, people who are easy to tease, hedonism, order
profile.story: Skuld is already aware that the divide between the Celestial Realm and the Surface World will eventually dissipate, plunging the whole world into chaos. However, such complications lie outside the scope of her interest.

basicInfo.name: PCTable.PcName_Skuld
basicInfo.flavor: Whenever complications arose as a result of war, she occasionally reappears to provide clues in service of a resolution. However, she never actively intervenes in solving matters herself, instead choosing to observe how events unfold from a distance.

Normal Attack.desc:
2 Enemies
 - Deals damage equal to 55% of Magic Attack 1 time(s).
 - 100% chance to inflict Magic Vulnerability. [Duration: 2 Turn(s)]
Skill Enhancement Effect
 - Adds Effect: 100% chance to inflict 10% Magic Vulnerability. [Duration: 2 Turn(s)]

Skill 1.name: Celestial Journey
Skill 1.desc:
All Enemies
 - Deals damage equal to 32% of Magic Attack 2 time(s).
 - 50% chance to inflict Silence. [Duration: 2 Turn(s)]
 - [100% chance to inflict Incoming Healing Reduction against targets inflicted with [Magic Vulnerability]. [Duration: 3 Turn(s)]
 - Allies (Magic)
 - Grants 2 Debuff Removal(s).
Skill Enhancement Effect
 - Increases Chance: Silence chance becomes 60%.

Skill 2.name: Constellation's Secret
Skill 2.desc:
All Enemies
 - Deals damage equal to 26% of Magic Attack 3 time(s).
 - Deals Piercing damage equal to 26% of Magic Attack 3 time(s).
 - 100% chance to inflict Buff Duration Reduction. [Reduced by: 2 Turn(s)]
 - 60% chance to increase skill cooldowns by 19s against targets inflicted with [Magic Vulnerability].
 - 60% chance to increase skill cooldowns by 23s against targets inflicted with [Magic Vulnerability].
Skill Enhancement Effect
 - Adds Effect: Pierce
 - Increases Effect: Skill Cooldown Increase becomes 23s.

Passive.name: Crescent Moon Seer
Passive.desc:
Self
 - Grants All Damage Nullification. [Ends After: Taking 3 Hit(s)]
 - Grants All Damage Nullification. [Ends After: Taking 4 Hit(s)]
 - All Enemies
 - Inflicts Effect Resist Reduction. [Always Active]
Skill Enhancement Effect
 - Increases Stacks: All Damage Nullification ends after taking 4 hit(s).
Transcend Lv.2 Effect
 - Self
 - Adds Healing: Heals HP equal to 165% of the caster's Magic Attack when HP falls to 50% or lower. [2 Time(s) per Battle]
Transcend Lv.6 Effect
 - Self
 - Increases Effect: Grants All Damage Nullification upon consuming Threads of Fate. [Ends After: Taking 4 Hit(s)]
 - Adds Effect: Grants 3 Debuff Removal(s) upon consuming Threads of Fate.

transcendence.transcend_7: Increases All Attack, Defense, and HP by 2%.
transcendence.transcend_8: Increases All Attack, Defense, and HP by 2%.
transcendence.transcend_9: Increases All Attack, Defense, and HP by 2%.
transcendence.transcend_10: Increases All Attack, Defense, and HP by 2%.

transcendence.transcend_12: Increases All Attack, Defense, and HP by 2%.

basicInfo.name: PCTable.PcName_Skuld
basicInfo.flavor: Skuld established the Celestial Guardians alongside Freyja. After introducing Freyja to several cooperators and allies and delivering a brief prophecy upon the organization's creation, she vanished.

Normal Attack.desc:
2 Enemies
 - Deals damage equal to 50% of Magic Attack 1 time(s).
Skill Enhancement Effect
 - Increases Damage: To 50% of Physical Attack.

Skill 1.name: Celestial Journey
Skill 1.desc:
All Enemies
 - Deals damage equal to 30% of Magic Attack 2 time(s).
 - 45% chance to inflict Silence. [Duration: 2 Turn(s)]
 - [100% chance to inflict Incoming Healing Reduction against targets inflicted with [Magic Vulnerability]. [Duration: 3 Turn(s)]
 - Allies (Magic)
 - Grants 1 Debuff Removal(s).
Skill Enhancement Effect
 - Increases Damage: To 30% of Physical Attack.

Skill 2.name: Constellation's Secret
Skill 2.desc:
All Enemies
 - Deals damage equal to 25% of Magic Attack 3 time(s).
 - 100% chance to inflict Buff Duration Reduction. [Reduced by: 1 Turn(s)]
 - 50% chance to increase skill cooldowns by 16s against targets inflicted with [Magic Vulnerability].
Skill Enhancement Effect
 - Increases Damage: To 25% of Physical Attack.

Passive.name: Crescent Moon Seer
Passive.desc:
Self

 - All Enemies
 - Inflicts Effect Resist Reduction. [Always Active]

basicInfo.name: PCTable.PcName_Skuld
basicInfo.flavor: Skuld is the youngest of the Three Sisters of Fate and a valkyrie with the gift of foresight. In the aftermath of the Great Celestial War many eons ago, she lost her sisters and was later discovered alone by the other valkyries.

Normal Attack.desc:
2 Enemies
 - Deals damage equal to 45% of Magic Attack 1 time(s).
Skill Enhancement Effect
 - Increases Damage: To 45% of Physical Attack.

 - [100% chance to inflict Incoming Healing Reduction against targets inflicted with [Magic Vulnerability]. [Duration: 3 Turn(s)]
 - Allies (Magic)
 - Grants 1 Debuff Removal(s).
Skill Enhancement Effect
 - Increases Damage: To 25% of Physical Attack.

 - 100% chance to inflict Buff Duration Reduction. [Reduced by: 1 Turn(s)]

Skill Enhancement Effect
 - Increases Damage: To 21% of Physical Attack.

Passive.desc:
Self

 - All Enemies
 - Inflicts Effect Resist Reduction. [Always Active]
